name: Beef and Orzo Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tops off the green peppers. Remove seeds and membranes.
2. Blanch the peppers for 3 minutes in boiling salted water. Drain and invert on paper towels.
3. Make the pesto: In a food processor or blender, combine parsley, 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese, walnuts, basil, salt, and garlic. Process until blended. Slowly pour in olive oil with the motor running; process until blended. Reserve.
4. Cook ground beef in a large frying pan until no longer pink. Drain excess fat.
5. Stir in pesto, orzo, and tomato. Spoon the mixture equally into the pepper shells.
6. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes. Sprinkle with additional grated Parmesan cheese.
